thinking.text:
The customer doesn't have a business, so they're looking for a personal credit card. Let me look at what first-year annual fee waiver promotions are available for personal credit cards.

From what I found:

1. **Platinum Rewards Card**: New Customer Promo - First Year Annual Fee Waived (promo window: 2024-06-01 to 2024-12-31) - This already ended since it's now Nov 2025.

2. **Business Platinum Rewards Card**: New Customer First Year Fee Waiver (promo window: 2025-11-01 to 2026-02-28) - But this is a business card.

3. **Business Silver Rewards Card**: New Customer First Year Fee Waiver (promo window: 2025-11-15 to 2026-01-15) - Also business.

So for personal cards, the only one I see is the Platinum Rewards Card which expired on 2024-12-31 - that's already past.

Let me search more broadly for any personal credit cards with first-year annual fee waiver promotions that are currently active.

tool_calls.Name: KB_search
tool_calls.Arguments: {"query": "personal credit card first year annual fee waived promotion current active 2025"}
